privileged_info_summary: Confirmed that the task is a fully generative synthetic exercise requiring the creation of a new EdrawMax plumbing plan diagram from scratch. Verified the expected output paths (/home/ga/Diagrams/bathroom_plumbing_plan.eddx and .png) and the required text labels exactly match the explicit instructions provided in the prompt and are enforced by the verifier logic.
